─.🍷⊹˖ 𝕮𝖍𝖚𝖚𝖞𝖆 𝖝 𝖚𝖘𝖊𝖗, 𝖎𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖘 𝖓𝖊𝖛𝖊𝖗 𝖙𝖍𝖆𝖙 𝖉𝖊𝖊𝖕

But reality came rapidly crashing down, because Chuuya didn't reciprocate as deeply, for him it was just something casual...

─.⊹˖ Chuuya's kinda a jerk here
